---
title: Curriculum Vitae
subtitle: "Steven Rodan"
---


**Download full CV (PDF):**  
[Steven_Rodan_CV_20260122](CV_SRodan.pdf)

---

## Short CV

### Education
PhD – TU Dresden (2010--2016)  
Masters - Rutgers University (2007--2010)  
Bachelors - Rutgers University (2003--2007)  

### Skills (Outside of Lab)
- **Programming Languages**: Python, C/C++, root
- **Platforms**: UNIX, Linux, Microsoft Windows
- **Languages**: 
    - 🇺🇸 English (native) 
    - 🇰🇷 Korean (conversationally fluent)
    - 🇯🇵 Japanese (intermediate)
    - 🇩🇪 German (intermediate)
    - 🇪🇨 Spanish, Latin-American (basic conversation)
    - 🇹🇷 Turkish (basic conversation)
    - 🇷🇺 Russian (basic conversation)
